title: barleria buxifolia
intro: Barleria buxifolia, also known as 'Blue Crest', is a tropical evergreen shrub native to the Western Ghats of India and Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Barleria buxifolia include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat various health ailments.
